description: OpenCut architecture workflows — v11: added CLIP visual scene classification, local background removal (RMBG-1.4), and local TTS/voice cloning (OuteTTS) specs.

text-animations.label: Text Animations
text-animations.description: 20+ preset text animations (fade, slide, zoom, bounce, typewriter, glitch, neon, etc.)

multi-output.description: Route compositions to multiple outputs (preview, external monitor, streaming, recording)

bundle-optimizer.label: Bundle Optimizer
bundle-optimizer.description: Performance budgets, lazy loading, code splitting, Vite manual chunks

layers-3d-panel.label: 3D Layers Panel
layers-3d-panel.description: React UI panel for 3D layer management — import modal, layer list, transform controls, material editor, animation config

keyframes-panel.label: Keyframes Panel
keyframes-panel.description: React UI panel for keyframe management — channel list, 13 easing modes, curve preview, copy/paste/export/import

audio-panel.label: Audio Panel
audio-panel.description: React UI panel with 4 tabs: 10-band EQ, effects (reverb/compressor/limiter/noise gate), BPM detection, varispeed

text-animations-panel.label: Text Animations Panel
text-animations-panel.description: React UI panel with 20+ presets filtered by category (entrance/exit/emphasis/special), duration/delay controls

proxy-panel.label: Proxy Panel
proxy-panel.description: React UI panel with 3 tabs: generation status/progress, config (resolution/quality/format/cache), cache management

project-bundle-panel.label: Project Bundle Panel
project-bundle-panel.description: React UI panel for .opencut export/import — metadata form, drag-drop import, validation display, bundle info

history-panel.label: History Panel
history-panel.description: React UI panel for command history — undo/redo buttons, filter (all/undoable/redone), jump to index, persistent storage

multi-output-panel.label: Multi-Output Panel
multi-output-panel.description: React UI panel for output routing — add/remove outputs, type/resolution config, enable/disable toggles, active selection

editor-header.label: Editor Header
editor-header.description: Top bar with project dropdown, bundle export/import buttons, feedback, export, theme toggle

clip-worker.label: CLIP Worker
clip-worker.description: Dedicated Web Worker for CLIP vision-language model inference (Xenova/clip-vit-base-patch32). WebGPU-first, WASM fallback.

clip-model-store.label: CLIP Model Store
clip-model-store.description: Zustand store for CLIP model lifecycle (idle → downloading → ready → error). Exposes embedImage(), embedTexts(), classifyFrame() as Promise-based methods.

scene-detect-panel.label: SceneDetectPanel
scene-detect-panel.description: React panel for scene detection with optional CLIP visual classification toggle. Decodes afterThumbnail data URLs to ImageData for CLIP inference.

broll-analyzer.label: BrollAnalyzer
broll-analyzer.description: Transcript-based B-roll suggestion engine. Extended with scoreFrameRelevance() and enrichWithVisualConfidence() for CLIP-powered visual scoring.

bg-removal-worker.label: BG Removal Worker
bg-removal-worker.description: Web Worker running briaai/RMBG-1.4 via @huggingface/transformers. WebGPU-first, WASM fallback. Exponential-backoff retry on download failures.

bg-removal-service.label: BackgroundRemovalService
bg-removal-service.description: Main-thread singleton. Decodes files, downscales to ≤1024×1024, sends to worker, upscales alphaMask, composites RGBA, encodes PNG. Also handles frame batches with abort support.

bg-removal-store.label: BG Removal Store
bg-removal-store.description: Zustand store for background removal model lifecycle (idle → downloading → ready → error). Mirrors ai-model-store.ts pattern.

tts-worker.label: TTS Worker
tts-worker.description: Web Worker for OuteTTS on-device speech synthesis (onnx-community/OuteTTS-0.2-500M or OuteAI/Llama-OuteTTS-1.0-1B-ONNX). WebGPU-first, WASM fallback. Handles synthesize and encode_speaker messages.

tts-model-store.label: TTS Model Store
tts-model-store.description: Zustand store for TTS model lifecycle. Tracks stage, progress, ETA, device, selectedModel, downloadSizeBytes. Follows transcription-model-store.ts pattern.

tts-idb.label: TTS IndexedDB
tts-idb.description: IndexedDB helpers for ClonedVoice persistence. DB: opencut-tts. Stores: cloned-voices + speaker-descriptors. Atomic transactions for save/delete.

flows.label: CLIP Visual Scene Classification
flows.description: User loads the CLIP model and enables visual classification in SceneDetectPanel. After scene detection, each afterThumbnail is decoded to ImageData and classified via CLIP embeddings.

steps.data: Load signal — model never auto-loads on mount
Per-file byte-weighted progress → UI progress bar
Returns SceneChange[] with afterThumbnail data URLs
Image + canvas → ImageData (runs on main thread)
UUID-keyed pending promise registered in module-level Map
9 LABEL_PROMPTS scores → { category: SceneCategory, confidence: number }

steps.action: Render per-scene category label + ★ highlight badge

flows.label: Local Background Removal (RMBG-1.4)
flows.description: User opens BackgroundRemovalDialog. Model loads on mount via initWorker(). User clicks 'Remove Background' — image is decoded, downscaled, sent to worker, alphaMask returned, composited, and encoded as transparent PNG.

steps.data: Creates Worker from worker.ts, posts { type: 'load' }
Byte-weighted aggregate across all model shards → progress bar
OffscreenCanvas decode + downscale preserving aspect ratio
nanoid request ID registered in pendingRequests Map

steps.action: Post { type: 'result', id, alphaMask, width, height }
steps.data: Float32Array transferred back to main thread
Nearest-neighbour upscale → RGB preserved, alpha = round(mask*255) → PNG Blob
Transparent-background PNG shown in before/after slider

flows.label: Local TTS & Voice Cloning (OuteTTS)
flows.description: User selects a TTS model, loads it, generates voiceover from text, and optionally clones a voice from reference audio. All inference runs on-device via OuteTTS Web Worker.

steps.action: Select model (Small ~335 MB / Large ~630 MB), click 'Load'
Enter text, select voice, click Generate

steps.data: Validates text (non-empty), voiceId (known), clamps speed/pitch to [0.5, 2.0]

steps.action: Post { type: 'synthesize', requestId, text, speakerDescriptor, speed, pitch }
steps.data: UUID requestId registered in pendingSynthesize Map

steps.action: Post { type: 'synthesize_complete', requestId, audioData, sampleRate, tokenTimestamps }

steps.data: Voiceover added as audio track element

flows.label: TTS Voice Cloning
flows.description: User provides reference audio (5–30 s) to clone a voice. OuteTTS encodes it into a SpeakerDescriptor persisted in IndexedDB. The cloned voice can then be used for synthesis.

steps.action: Upload reference audio (5–30 s), enter voice name

steps.data: Validates duration ≥ 5 s; trims to 30 s if longer
Float32Array audio data transferred to worker
{ id, name, isCloned: true, createdAt, descriptorId }
getAllVoices() now includes the new cloned voice
